name: Milton Rosenstock
abstract: Milton Rosenstock (June 9, 1917, New Haven, Connecticut - April 24, 1992, New York City) was an American conductor, composer, and arranger.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Hall
about_quotes.evidence: Milton Rosenstock was the conductor of the show... we'd rehearsed the first part of it pretty thoroughly with Milton Rosenstock
